attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.RESOURCE_TYPE_ID, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.RESOURCE_CLASS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.RESOURCE_TYPE_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.NAME, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.DESCRIPTION, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.TABLE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.ACCESS_KEY, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.SQL_TEXT, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.GROUP_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES,
 (
 select RESOURCE_TYPE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES
 minus
 select RESOURCE_TYPE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.RESOURCE_TYPE_ID = STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.RESOURCE_TYPE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_TYPES.REFRESH_DATETIME
